author: S Akash
name: INT6 10L SWA NorMuon (NTK eval — suboptimal)
blurb: 10-layer GPT with INT6 quantization (3.82x compression), SWA weight averaging (50 snapshots), NorMuon optimizer with decoupled weight decay, aggressive warmdown (20000 iters). Pre-quant val_bpb=1.1923 is competitive but NTK RoPE eval at 4096 context hurt post-quant score. Rerun without NTK expected to yield ~1.19.
